title: SCP-012, A bad composition
description: An anomalous musical note that bleeds its victims to death...
body:
A bad composition adds a new monster. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-012, also known as A bad composition.


SCP-012 appears as a dangerous, cursed sheet stored inside an Iron Box. Handling or opening the box incorrectly can injure players and nearby entities. Nearby players and certain mobs will be pulled towards SCP-012 and being up close without the box closed will kill the victim. The box can be opened manually or via redstone, but proper containment is required to avoid its deadly effects.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-012 spawn?

SCP-012 spawns in a containment chamber, usually underground in the overworld. There may be multiple SCP-012s.
</details>



![SCP-012](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/367d7a46be543f03e06c23ab2efac21a7d46fa5c.png)

SCP-012 is a musical score stored in an Iron Box within the containment chamber. If the box is broken, the sheet drops, and having it in the inventory causes the Bleeding effect. The Iron Box can be right-clicked to open and close. The Iron Box can also be closed with redstone signals. When open, SCP-012 pulls entities toward itself and inflicts Bleeding on players, villagers and illagers within 3 blocks. Entities that have the bleeding effect will have a red screen, red particles and hear a heartbeat sound, while taking 2 hearts damage every second. Players won't be able to close the Iron Box while bleeding, due to SCP-012 anomalous abilities. An Iron Box can also be crafted with 8 iron ingots and 1 glass block, but be careful while transporting SCP-012

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
